case_title: PEERIN PIANPRASERDKOOL ET AL VS. LOOLY'S PBC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIANPRASERDKOOL, PEERIN SONTIOUTCHARA, SUJIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOOLY'S PBC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1298 CHURCH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94114 $26,500.00 RENT, $1,930.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,430.00, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT
